name: OLYMPIA 1200W diode laser
shortDescription: 1200W professional diode laser with 4 wavelengths, 5 adjustable spot sizes and a smart control system. Powerful performance, realistic price — European-level value for money.
description: Olympia was the place where only the best mattered. Where it didn't matter where you came from — but what you could actually do. That is exactly what the OLYMPIA diode laser stands for: the performance that counts. Realistic price, powerful machine, real results.
metaTitle: OLYMPIA 1200W diode laser | 4 wavelengths, 5 spot sizes, value-for-money champion
metaDescription: OLYMPIA – 1200W professional diode laser with 4 wavelengths and 5 adjustable spot sizes. European-level value for money, smart control system.

videoDescription.headline: OLYMPIA – Where performance wins
paragraphs: In Olympia there were no excuses. Only results. The competition was not for the loud, but for those who were prepared, precise and persistent. That is exactly what the OLYMPIA diode laser stands for.

1200W output power, 5 adjustable spot sizes, smart control system — all together, what really matters for a professional salon. Not the most expensive, not the cheapest. The best choice that truly pays off.

afterVideo.text: Have a question about OLYMPIA? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.subtitle: Come to our showroom in Érd and try it yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the OLYMPIA 1200W diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if it's the best choice for you. "Μολὼν λαβέ — Come and take it!"

featureRows.headline: Why choose OLYMPIA?
featureRows.subtitle: 1200W power, 5 adjustable spot sizes, smart control system – the performance that counts.

features.title: 1200W power – not average
features.description:
1200W output power is the level where you don't need to "play tricks" during treatments. It just works — fast, efficiently, predictably. Average diode lasers on the market operate around 600-800W; OLYMPIA already represents the powerful category.

What this means in practice:

Faster treatments
More efficient work
Flexible adaptation
Stable, predictable operation

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for every skin type
features.description:
The combination of four different wavelengths (755 / 808 / 940 / 1064 nm) provides broad treatment flexibility in a single device.
755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal
940 nm – darker skin tone
1064 nm – deep hair follicles

features.title: 5 adjustable spot sizes – a true rarity
features.description: 5 adjustable spot sizes are not just a comfort feature — but an advantage in every treatment. Precision work on smaller areas (face, underarms, bikini), fast progress on large areas (legs, back, chest). You work exactly the way the situation demands.

features.title: Smart control system – stands by you
features.description: OLYMPIA's smart built-in control system helps with everyday salon work. You aren't necessarily looking for the most expensive machine, but the one that truly pays off and is a high-quality, reliable partner in treatments. In our training you will learn to keep the high energy under control.

features.title: European-level value for money
features.description: OLYMPIA's positioning is clear: if alongside wanting to perform perfect treatments you also have a bit of competitive spirit, then this is the right machine. Powerful, yet accessible. "Μολὼν λαβέ" — as Leonidas said: "Come and take it!"
features.highlight: Excellent value for money at European level.

training.headline: Operator training – part of the purchase
training.intro: The price of the OLYMPIA device includes the comprehensive operator training. You will learn to keep the high energy under control and to confidently operate the built-in smart system.
items: The device's operating principle and safety considerations
Use of the smart control system
Optimal settings according to skin and hair type
Proper use of the 5 spot sizes for different body areas
closingParagraphs: Live model practical training with own model +59.990 Ft – particularly recommended for those who want to master the treatment protocols in a real treatment situation.
The basic operator training is free with the machine purchase, and we issue a FAR certificate for successful completion.
training.freeText: Basic training FREE with machine purchase!

expertQuote.quote: OLYMPIA does exactly what a 1200W diode laser should do — fast, efficiently, reliably. The combination of 5 spot sizes and the smart control system raises it above average, while the price remains accessible. This machine is the value-for-money champion of the category.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

functionCards.name: 5 spot sizes
functionCards.description: Adjustable crystal treatment head – precise or fast.

functionCards.name: Multi-stage cooling
functionCards.description: TEC + water + air – stable all-day use.

faq.question: Why 1200W for OLYMPIA?
faq.answer: Average diode lasers on the market operate around 600-800W. 1000-1200W systems already represent the powerful category, where treatments speed up and results become predictable. Particularly worthwhile in higher-traffic salons.

faq.question: What does 5 adjustable spot sizes mean?
faq.answer: The crystal treatment head can be adjusted to 5 different sizes. Smaller spot size for precise, targeted treatments (face, underarms, bikini), larger spot size for fast, large-surface treatments (legs, back, chest, thighs).

faq.question: What does the smart control system provide?
faq.answer: Built-in protocols and helper functions that speed up and make daily salon treatments safer. It does not replace professional knowledge but supports it.

faq.question: How quickly does it pay off?
faq.answer: An average client takes a diode laser treatment worth approximately 50,000 Ft. With just 20 clients, revenue of approximately 1,000,000 Ft can be realized. The 1200W power and fast treatment time make continuous use of the device possible.

faq.question: What is the difference between OLYMPIA, ATHENA and HELIOS?
faq.answer: All three are different configurations of the same platform: ATHENA (1000W) — precision and control, OLYMPIA (1200W) — the smart choice, value-for-money champion, HELIOS (1600W) — top tier, maximum performance. OLYMPIA is the most powerful version of the mid-range at a realistic price.

faq.question: What is included in the price?
faq.answer: The price includes comprehensive operator training, FAR certificate, 2-year warranty and the Hungarian-language user manual. Delivery time is 2-6 weeks. For an exact price, request a consultation.

whatsIncluded: Crystal treatment head adjustable in 5 sizes
